name: Event Demo 1
on: 
    pull_request:
        types:
            - opened
        branches:
            - main
            - 'dev-*'
            - 'feat/**'
    workflow_dispatch:
    push:
        branches:
            - main
            - 'dev-*' # dev-new dev-this-is-new
            - 'feat/**' # feat/new feat/new/button
        paths-ignore:
            - '.github/workflows/*
jobs:
    deploy:
        runs-on: ubuntu-latest
        steps:
            - name: Output event data
              run: echo "${{ toJSON(github.event) }}"
            - name: Get Code
              uses: actions/checkout@v3
            - name: Install dependencies
              run: npn ci
